revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: hopefully last batch of imports
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude />#invoke:params| all_sorted| setting|i/l|; | & | with_name_matching|author%s*%d*$| or|last%s*%d*$| or|first%s*%d*$| or|author%-link%s*%d*$| call_for_each_group|Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors/author }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|heading=[[File:Test Template Info-Icon - Version (2).svg|50px|alt=|link=]] Template documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude />#invoke:params| all_sorted| setting|i/l|; | & | with_name_matching|author%s*%d*$| or|last%s*%d*$| or|first%s*%d*$| or|author%-link%s*%d*$| call_for_each_group|Module:Params/doc/examples/list of authors/author }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|heading=[[File:Test Template Info-Icon - Version (2).svg|50px|alt=|link=]] Template documentation}}</noinclude>
